raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California prison system requires a shift in culture to provide incarcerated people with the support and resources needed to reintegrate back into society.",
    "Community-Based Organizations are best positioned to provide quality services to incarcerated people and decrease the chances of recidivism.",
    "California’s Penal Code does not reflect the importance or role of community-based programs in prisons.",
    "More than 95 percent of incarcerated people will be released back into the community.",
    "The decades-old approach of warehousing incarcerated individuals has resulted in overcrowded prisons and high recidivism rates.",
    "CBOs are currently funded at less than half of one percent of the entire CDCR budget."
  ]
}
```
